feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is there any possibility to convert a Hana Graphical Calculation view to SAP DataSphere view?
entry.content:
I have a new mission that is figure out a way to convert Hana Graphical view to SAP DataSphere view.

I did not find any doc or even comment about this procedure, so does any one had issue like this or have heard something that can help me. 

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content:
Dear Team,

our requirement is, customer was using s4hana, they want to connect the secondary system in SAP using read access mode, we have enabled the logreplay_readaccess mode in secondary system, but when we are trying to login it shows license error, i want to know which license is required to login into secondary system, i have found below SAP note, please give me some solution for this requirement.

please go through the link regarding the Active/Active Read enabled option

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4e9b18c116aa42fc84c7dbfd02111aba/6c47a595535e494f94567b209fbf8579.html

2685661 - Licensing required for HANA System Replication

in the license Management what they have mentioned is below

The SAP HANA Active/Active read-enabled option requires additional licensing (see also the Feature Scope Description for SAP HANA); the license for Active/Active (read enabled) also covers the multi-target replication scenario. Active/Active is enabled by setting the system replication operation mode to logreplay_readaccess, the secondary system is then operated automatically with the license key of the primary system. Changes to the license key are done on the primary system and replicated to the secondary system (see also Managing SAP HANA Licenses).

Thanks,

+91-9553836498

entry.title: Consume Level Based Hierarchy from HANA View in WEBI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a Level based Hierarchy in HANA Calculation View ( HANA 2.0) . I am able to consume that Hierarchy in Analysis for Office.

My Question here is I am trying to consume the same Hierarchy in WEBI (BOBJ 4.2 SP9 Patch 1), I can not consume the Hierarchy with the levels.

Can someone please share if you face this issue and resolution.

 

Thanks,

Sriram

entry.title: Last Used Date for a Procedure in SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I have some Procedures defined in a HANA schema and would like to know whether they are used or not.

Can someone help me with the system tables/views I have to use in order to find whether and when a Procedure was last executed.

Regards,

Dimitar

entry.title: SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition)
entry.content:
Hello experts, do you know what is the purpose for this SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition.)

In the  UnofficialPAM the description is a License, and the customer has a BOM with this SKU: do you have some examples? the BOM only includes this SKU (related to HANA EE)

8017496SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private editionUpsellLicenseGeneric Private CloudUpgrades HANA use rights of S/4HANA Enterprise Management. Please note that customer may require Data Provisioning Agent in most cases (already included with S/4HANA EM and installed on-demand basis).
XSA is included on request only.

and yet this SKU mentions that the DP agent is included by default.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Business One licensing schema
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question about SAP Business One version for HANA in virtualization environment, If I intends to utilize VMware SRM for Disaster Recovery Center (DRC) scenario, will there be any impact on their hardware key if I activate the secondary server? Will it change or the secondary server will using the same hardware key? In my experience, in SQL version the hardware key still the same, but how about in HANA version?

Thank you,

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Query Regarding Lift-and-Shift Process for RISE Migration
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are planning to execute a lift-and-shift migration and have the following queries related to the process:

1. HANA System Replication to RISE 

   We are looking to perform a lift-and-shift migration from our on-premises environment to RISE with SAP. Could you please confirm if it is feasible to use SAP HANA System Replication for this migration? If so, could you provide any specific guidelines or prerequisites for setting up HANA system replication between the on-premises system and RISE?

2. Backup During Lift-and-Shift

   In the context of lift-and-shift migration, we would like to understand how data backups should be handled during the migration process. Specifically:

   - How should the data backup be transferred to the migration server?

   - Will the migration mount point on the migration server need to be added to the on-premises server for this transfer, or is there a different recommended approach for ensuring proper backup handling during the migration?

We appreciate your assistance and look forward to your guidance on these topics.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: A Nota Técnica 2021.001 (Evento Comprovante de Entrega da NF-e)
entry.content:
Ola,

 

Alguém conhece alguma empresa que implementou o controle de canhoto conforme: A Nota Técnica 2021.001 (Evento Comprovante de Entrega da NF-e).

entry.title: XS Job Scheduler Dashboard Using REST API Authentication
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Following the blog I was able to create the XS Jobs using the scheduler.createJob function, similarly was able to use other functions as well.

I have scheduled a procedure with action as thisAppURI + "/js/hana/execute?hdbprocedure=" + jobActionProcedure.

Now, I am getting "Unauthorised" error when the job is executed. I am using XSUAA for authentication. I also gave username and password in job configuration which has access to execute the procedure but no luck. My guess is to add some API authorisation to that user but cannot find any documents related to that

In this blog, there is some mention to grant using SAP_JWT_TRUST_ACL but it is not ver clear on what has to be done.

Thank You.
Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

entry.title: Why is S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in? HANA has also encountered this before
entry.content: S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in, prompted with incorrect name or password. Hana has experienced this before, may I ask why it happened? How can I reset my password？

entry.title: How often to update HANA Cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello, 

is there a recommendation on how often you should update the SAP HANA Cockpit?

And at what intervals are updates for the SAP HANA Cockpit released?

Thank you very much

 

Christopher Augustin

entry.title: Issue while accessing the Ariba application in BTP workzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have exposed the Ariba application from on-Prem to BTP workzone, While trying to access the Ariba application inside the BTP work zone we are getting the below error, but while accessing the url outside the BTP workzone it is working correctly. Please let me know if further details needed.

Any suggestions will be helpful to deal with this issue in BTP workzone.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: CAP project for deployment to HANA XSA
entry.content:
Going through this link to create a CAP project in HANA XSA environment. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/xsa-cap-create-project..html

Do we still follow the approach in the tutorial above or is it better to create CAP project using BAS and deploy to HANA XSA (using on-prem HANA DB) via XS tooling in BAS? 

please advise. @jung-thomas 

thanks

entry.title: HANA DB Replication
entry.content:
Hi,

While trying to re-sync the On-prem HANA DB DR replication, the status shown in Hana studio in percentage is getting reverse, like as it reach to 10%, then suddenly it drops back to 8%, have tried setting replication both ways sync and async but still same result.

What might be the reason, please advise. If anybody have experience this.

entry.title: Settlement management - incorrect cancellation of accruals
entry.content:
I have Settlement Management set up with settings very close to standard and I have the following issue. 

There are 3 settlement dates: 1 - Delta accrual, 2 - Delta accrual, 3 - Partial settlement (and this goes on as accruals are posted every month and partial settlement every quarter). 
1  posts the accrual OK, 252 USD - correct - both RES1 and RED1 condition populated, but only RES1 active
2 cancels 1, then post, 630 USD - correct - - both RES1 and RED1 condition populated, but only RES1 active. REA2 is there as cancellation with -252 (correct)
3 (partial settlement) cancels both 1 and 2 with REA2 -882 which should only be -630, then posts full quarter amount (correctly). Here, accrual 1 should not be cancelled again, only accrual 2. 
How can this be fixed?

entry.title: SAP HANA Calculation Views - Graphical vs Directly from Views
entry.content:
Hi experts,

   I have created a Graphical Calculation View in SAP HANA based on my Views that were created with "CREATE VIEW" (1). I also created a Calculation View with only one Aggregation Node to read data directly from my Views (2). Then I created 2 Live Connections in SAC to test the performance, I found that the model created from (2) ran much faster than the model created from (1). I thought the Graphical is query data much faster but I received the contrast result.
Can anyone explain to me why? Thank you very much and wish you all a nice day.

entry.title: How to add exception handling in SAP HANA CURSOR.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue in cursor . It keep running and doesn't break even though there bad data.

Is there any way to add any exceptions handling .

Scenario - We are constructing Child - parent relationship and doing self join on a table with Parent and child as join,  However when Parent and Child are same , It is going in infinite loop and procedure keep running.

We are thinking to add some exception handling within cursor loop as cursor doesn break or fail even though there is bad data.

Please let us know if you have some suggestion 

Thanks

Ajinkya Patil

entry.title: Delta Accrual not Calculating Amounts
entry.content:
Hallo All

I am creating a delta accrual for a condition contract and when the settlement document is created the condition type that are supposed to be filled with the accrual values are showing a value of zero.

The condition type for volume determination correctly gets the total volume but others are showing zero.For example, ZEXB which is a copy of RES1 does not return a value for the same access which has been used to create the condition contract.

In this case a combination of Contract,Sales Org, Dist Channel and Plant was used in the master data but when I create the settlement document the value for plant is not determined.

What configuration could I have missed? I have gone through the documnetation in Note 2535889 for my relevant version

Please assist with resolution of this issue.  

1. Condition Contract Master Data

2. Settlement Document Header 

3. Settlement Document Pricing Analysis

entry.title: SCASE / UKM_CASE change/add function buttons into ALV Overview
entry.content:
Dears,

I know about the functionallity to add additional "Functions" to DCD cases using configuration + BADI implemenation.

The problem is this functionality does not cover the ALV display, where also additional function buttons are available like "Change field content", Reject, Release, Check....

We would need to be able to add a new function at this level, not a DCD level where I am able to make it. I have checked if those buttons are linked to the existing Functions but it is not, they are not using same methods. 

Could you please share with me if there is any option to make this possible?
Thank you in advanceç

Borja

entry.title: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various applications
entry.content:
Hello, I am configuring security scopes for several applications that communicate with our SAP CAP, for which we have created application-type xsuaa services for each of them,

however when trying to give permissions in our scope for those services it keeps giving me 401 unauthorized

However when I only add one service to the scope, this one works fine for me Could you help me know what causes this behavior? greetings and thanks
